build.error.initialWatchFailed: Initial build failed; staying in watch mode so the next change can retry
build.strict.watchWarning: Strict mode: build emitted {count} warning{plural} (watch mode keeps running)
watch.enabled: Watch mode enabled: tracking {count} path(s) for changes
check.contentOk: Content OK: {posts} posts, {pages} pages, {tags} tags, {authors} authors
importGhost.codeInjectionSkipped: Skipped code injection in {count} posts. Re-run with --keep-code-injection to import them.
importGhost.downloadedImages: Downloaded {downloaded} remote images into content/images/ ({failed} failed)
importGhost.dryRun.header: Dry run: no files written. Summary of what would land:
importGhost.dryRun.imagesNote: Note: --download-images is set, but no images were fetched in dry-run mode.
importGhost.dryRun.redirectsNote: Note: redirect snippets (_redirects, vercel.json, nginx.conf) would land under the target migration/redirects/.
importGhost.filteredItems: Filtered out {total} items ({status} status, {drafts} drafts, {pages} pages, {tag} tag mismatches, {date} before --since)
importGhost.invalidMaxImageSize: Invalid --max-image-size value: {value}. Expected a non-negative number with optional KB/MB/GB suffix (e.g. 10MB, 1GB, 0 to disable).
importGhost.invalidMaxPostHtmlSize: Invalid --max-post-html-size value: {value}. Expected a non-negative number with optional KB/MB/GB suffix (e.g. 5MB, 20MB, 0 to disable).
importGhost.invalidMaxSize: Invalid --max-size value: {value}. Expected a non-negative number with optional KB/MB/GB suffix (e.g. 256MB, 1GB, 0 to disable).
importGhost.invalidOnlyTags: Invalid --only-tags value: {value}. Expected one or more comma-separated tag slugs (e.g. news,blog).
importGhost.slugCollisions: Detected {count} intra-export slug collision(s). The first entity to claim each path was kept; later duplicates were refused. Audit the export for tampered or malformed slug data.
importGhost.redirectsWritten: Wrote migration/redirects/ snippets ({custom} custom, {slugChanges} from slug changes): _redirects, vercel.json, nginx.conf
new.invalidDate: Invalid --date value: {value}. Expected an ISO-8601 timestamp.
new.invalidSlug: Could not derive a valid slug from the provided positional value. Expected /^[a-z0-9][a-z0-9-]*$/.
new.optionDraftKind: --draft is only valid for "post" or "page" kind.
new.optionPostOnly: --date, --tags, and --author are only valid for "post" kind.
new.optionSlugKind: --slug is only valid for "post" or "page" kind; for "tag" / "author" the positional is already the slug.
new.emptyTitle: Title cannot be empty. Example: nectar new post "My First Post"
new.refuseOverwrite: Refusing to overwrite {path}. Pass --force to overwrite or --slug <other>.
new.warnEditorMissing: Warning: --open was passed but neither $VISUAL nor $EDITOR is set; open {path} manually.
serve.buildRequested: --build requested; running a build before serving ({distDir}).
serve.invalidCompression: Invalid --compression value: {value} (expected auto, gzip, br, or none)
serve.invalidSimulate: Invalid --simulate value: {value} (expected netlify, cloudflare-pages, or vercel)
serve.tlsReadFailed: Failed to read TLS certificate or key: {message}
serve.noBuildOutput: No build output at {distDir}; running an initial build before serving.
serve.rebuilt: Rebuilt {routeCount} routes ({assetCount} assets); pushing reload to {clientCount} client(s)
serve.serving: Serving {distDir} on {scheme}://{host}:{port}{basePath} (bound to {hostname}; local preview only, not for production hosting)
serve.simulating: Simulating {target} deploy artifacts: {headers} header rule(s), {redirects} redirect rule(s)
